title: Josh Allen (offensive lineman)
extract: Josh Nathanial Allen (born December 30, 1991) is an American former professional football player who was a center in the National Football League (NFL). He played college football for the Louisiana–Monroe Warhawks. He was also a member of the Tampa Bay Buccaneers, Green Bay Packers, San Francisco 49ers, Calgary Stampeders, Arizona Cardinals, Arizona Hotshots, and Dallas Renegades.
